name: ai-agent-demo-genarator
description: GitHubのIssueをトリガーにAIがPRを自動作成するDevOpsパイプライン

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm --filter ./gcp-webhook install && pnpm --filter ./cloudflare-workers install && pnpm --filter ./local-worker install && pnpm --filter ./local-dev/cf-queue-mock install && pnpm --filter ./local-dev/gcp-pubsub-relay install && pnpm --filter ./local-test install
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter ./gcp-webhook exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter ./cloudflare-workers exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter ./local-worker exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter ./local-dev/cf-queue-mock exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter ./local-dev/gcp-pubsub-relay exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter ./local-test exec tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.root.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.worker.json
scripts.worker:dev: cross-env PORT=8091 HTTP_MODE=true AGENT_MODE=GEMINI_ADK GCP_PROJECT=local-dev-project GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-2.0-flash GITHUB_TOKEN=dummy-token-not-used-in-dry-run DRY_RUN=true tsx src/worker-entrypoint.ts
scripts.worker:dev:aider: cross-env PORT=8091 HTTP_MODE=true AGENT_MODE=LOCAL_AIDER GCP_PROJECT=local-dev-project GITHUB_TOKEN=dummy-token-not-used-in-dry-run DRY_RUN=true tsx src/worker-entrypoint.ts
